title: Survex
description: Version 1.21.1 // An unofficial clientsided-only modpack used in Survex
body:
A simple unofficial **_clientside_** modpack used in Survex, bringing great performance and QOL mods to improve your experience.

---


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Survex does not require any mods to join, I made this to help others having performance issues with minecraft, and to have a cool fun clientsided modpack everyone can enjoy with my personal favourite mods :)

</details>

If you have issues with the modpack, submit a ticket on the Survex discord and we'd be happy to help you out! 

**Highly suggest downloading the latest versions**

---


![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56e127b4ff4c7457ba3d532d85f787769679b4ca.png)


## **Performance**

- _**Sodium**_ by [jellysquid3](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
- **_Sodium Extra_** by [FlashyReese](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra)
- **_ModernFix_** by [embeddedt](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix)
- _**BadOptimizations**_ by [thosea](https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations)
- _**Iris Shaders**_ by [coderbot](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)
- _**Lithium**_ by [jellysquid3](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
- _**Particle Core**_ by [fzzyhmstrs](https://modrinth.com/mod/particle-core)
- _**Faster Random**_ by [AnOpenSauceDev](https://modrinth.com/mod/faster-random)
- _**Debugify**_ by [isxander](https://modrinth.com/mod/debugify)
- _**Enhanced Block Entities**_ by [FoundationGames](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe)
- **_Entity Culling_** by [tr7zw](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)
- **_More Culling_** by [FX](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling)
- _**ImmediatelyFast**_ by [RaphiMC](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast)
- **_GpuTape_** by [Mr.Toad](https://modrinth.com/mod/gputape)
- **_DynamicFPS_** by [juliand665](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps)
- _**ScalableLux**_ by [ishland](https://modrinth.com/mod/scalablelux)
